title: MacroPulse Alert
message:
Strategy sold 3,588 BTC ($216M) on Jul 6 — largest BTC sale since 2022; BTC dipped below $62k on the news before recovering to ~$64,194 (+2% 24h).
2yr US inflation breakeven falls below 2% for first time since 2024 — first rate-cut signal since mid-2024, underpinning BTC recovery.
Next catalyst: June CPI print July 14.
